title: pogalis barbata
intro: Pogalis barbata, also known as hairy pogalis, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is native to various tropical regions, including India and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which help to reduce fever and treat skin infections. The hairy pogalis plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to reap its health benefits, including relief from respiratory issues and digestive problems.
